commands.review_summary:
The PR updates @typescript/native-preview from 7.0.0-dev.20260614.1 to 7.0.0-dev.20260621.1 and refreshes pnpm-lock.yaml.

Reproducibility: yes. The PR diff itself reproduces the issue: the lockfile changes unrelated resolved dependency versions beyond the stated @typescript/native-preview bump.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The blocker is a narrow mechanical lockfile-scope repair that automation can attempt on the PR branch.
